_comment: ExamPortal configuration — see README for setup instructions
_comment_endpoint_questions: 1. Deploy your Google Apps Script as a Web App
3. Encode it: open browser console, run: btoa('https://script.google.com/macros/s/YOUR_SCRIPT_ID/exec')
_comment_endpoint_results: Same process as above, but for your Results GAS endpoint (can be the same script)
_comment_users: Keys are usernames, values are SHA-256 hashes of passwords.
To generate a hash, run in browser console:
async function hash(p){const b=new TextEncoder().encode(p);const h=await crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256',b);return [...new Uint8Array(h)].map(x=>x.toString(16).padStart(2,'0')).join('');}
